message:
fix: Handle reflected comparison operators for class instances

When right operand is a class instance, use the correct reflected
operator with swapped arguments:
- a < ClassInstance → classInstanceGt(ClassInstance, a)
- a > ClassInstance → classInstanceLt(ClassInstance, a)
- a <= ClassInstance → classInstanceGe(ClassInstance, a)
- a >= ClassInstance → classInstanceLe(ClassInstance, a)

Previously all operators incorrectly used classInstanceEq.
